messages.content:
HoloGov-V. Return JSON only.
Keys exactly: verdict,route,final,preserve,repair,block,dep,objective,focus.
If g.passed=false: verdict=w.v, route=CONTINUE_WORKER, final=false.
If g.passed=true: verdict=w.v, route=FINAL_COMPILER, final=true.
Repair names the first gate failure, else empty.
No model choice. No prose. No markdown. No <think>.

{"id":"HV-KITC-078-A","g":{"passed":true,"failures":[],"artifact_verdict":"ALLOW","artifact_binding":"SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED","critical_term_count":5},"w":{"v":"ALLOW","b":"SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED","blockers":[],"features":["exact match on batch assay criterion date"]},"best":{"v":"ALLOW","b":"SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED","gate":"PASS"},"schema":{"verdict":"ALLOW | ESCALATE","route":"CONTINUE_WORKER | FINAL_COMPILER | FAIL_CLOSED","final":"boolean","preserve":"string, max 6 words; empty string if none","repair":"string, max 8 words; empty string if none","block":"string, max 8 words; empty string if none","dep":"string, max 8 words; empty string if none","objective":"string, max 5 words","focus":"string, max 5 words"}}

features: exact match on batch assay criterion date

schema.preserve: string, max 6 words; empty string if none
schema.repair: string, max 8 words; empty string if none
schema.block: string, max 8 words; empty string if none
schema.dep: string, max 8 words; empty string if none
